message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title **PCWS Sequences**

actor Customer
participant PCWS
database PostgreSQL
entity Disk
boundary "transfer_logs.sh" as transfer
participant "Account Service" as AccountService
participant "Datalog Service" as DatalogService

Customer -> PCWS : request image
PCWS -> AccountService : check account permission
PCWS -> PCWS : generate image
PCWS -> Disk : write data log
PCWS -> Customer : image

... some time later ...

loop [for each log]
    transfer <- Disk : read data log
    transfer -> DatalogService : send data log
    transfer <-- DatalogService
end

@enduml
```
